name: Hero Highlight
summary: An interactive hero section featuring a mouse-following spotlight effect with dot pattern backgrounds that change color on hover, creating an engaging, responsive first impression.
detailedDescription: The Hero Highlight component creates an interactive hero experience where a spotlight effect follows the mouse cursor across a dot pattern background. The component uses motion values to track mouse position, creating a subtle illuminated area that reveals a different colored dot pattern underneath. The background features SVG dot patterns that change from neutral gray to vibrant indigo when the spotlight passes over them, creating an engaging, responsive interaction. The effect works in both light and dark modes with appropriate color adjustments. This creates a playful yet professional interaction that rewards user exploration and keeps visitors engaged. Perfect for hero sections, landing pages, or any context where adding subtle interactivity enhances the first impression. The component balances visual interest with readability, ensuring the spotlight effect enhances rather than distracts from the main content message.
purpose: Create interactive hero sections with mouse-following spotlight
Engage visitors through responsive hover interactions
Add subtle playfulness to professional hero designs
Reward user exploration with visual feedback
Balance visual interest with content readability
behavior: Tracks mouse position using motion values
Creates spotlight effect following cursor movement
Changes dot pattern colors when spotlight passes over
Supports both light and dark mode themes
Uses SVG patterns for crisp, scalable graphics
visualCharacteristics: Mouse-following spotlight creating interactive focal point
Dot pattern background changing colors on interaction
Excellent dark and light mode support
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
